_README_READ_BEFORE_EDITING: ============================================================================  ROUND-50 LIVE ROSTER OVERRIDE  ============================================================================  The LIVE round 50 runs 21 races. The round-50 SOURCE DATA (data/races/*.json, mirrored bit-exact from ../OpenDominion-source @ round-50) marks 22 races playable:true. The one-race delta is PLANEWALKER: it is playable:true in the source, but the round-50 admins DISABLED it in the live round.  DO NOT flip planewalker's `playable` flag in data/races/planewalker.json — that flag mirrors the PHP source (Race::where('playable', true)) and the golden vectors depend on it staying true. Record the live-round delta HERE instead.  Selection layers — the OVERTURE race picker (app `races()`), python `list_races()`, and the full-round break-even table — use engine::data::round50_live_keys() / is_round50_live(), which = (source `playable`) AND (NOT listed below). The engine can STILL simulate a disabled race when handed its key directly (needed for fidelity / golden vectors); this override only governs what gets OFFERED.  To change the live roster, edit ONLY the `disabled_despite_playable` list below. The 9 classic/legacy/nox variants are already excluded via playable:false in their own race JSONs and need not be repeated here.
